upasargachandrika.example_text: 'mahimAnaM yadutkIrya tava saMhriyate vacaH SrameRa tad aSaktyA vA na guRAnAmiyattayA' (raGu0 1033) utkIrya saMstutya
'na dattvA parikIrtayet' (manu0 4236) na parikIrtayet na parasya kaTayet noccErGozayet
